properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Jesus is precious, Jesus is precious; Oh yes, Jesus is precious to me. He is all that I long for, What more could I ask for, When Jesus is precious to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's not these earthly treasures, Friends it is not these old world's pleasures, That seem so important to me, It is not this earthly kingship, And I thank God for all my friendships, Oh!, but my Jesus, is so precious to me.

verse.name: v4
